allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); attrs=set\(\); [attrs.add\(a['key']\) for b in d.get\('batches',[]\) for ss in b.get\('scopeSpans',[]\) for sp in ss.get\('spans',[]\) for a in sp.get\('attributes',[]\)]; print\('span attr keys:', sorted\(attrs\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(' ',x['name'],x['type'],'uid='+x['uid']\) for x in d]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(' ',x['title'],'-> uid',x['uid']\) for x in d]")
